code:
import io
import string

let content = io.read_to_end()
let total = string.len(content)
mut count = 0
mut i = 0
while i < total
  match string.byte_at(content, i)
  when Some(b)
    if b == 10
      count = count + 1
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if total > 0
  match string.byte_at(content, total - 1)
  when Some(last)
    if last != 10
      count = count + 1
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
end

println("lines=#{count}")
